summary: Tested Cultivos tabbed modal rewrite, dynamic Formas de Pago and Tipos IVA dropdowns in Proveedores and Clientes. All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly.

features_tested: Tabbed modal with 3 tabs (Datos Generales, Detalles Tecnicos, Historial)
Tipo dropdown loads dynamic options from /api/tipos-cultivo
Gear icon opens Tipos de Cultivo manager modal (zIndex 1100)
Historial tab shows message for new cultivo
Datos Gestion tab has Forma de Pago dropdown with gear icon
Datos Gestion tab has IVA dropdown with gear icon
Formas de Pago manager modal opens and shows items (Cheque, Confirming, Contado, etc.)
Tipos de IVA manager modal opens and shows items (Exento 0%, Reducido 10%, General 21%, Superreducido 4%)
Datos Gestion tab has Forma de Pago dropdown with gear icon
Datos Gestion tab has IVA dropdown with gear icon
Formas de Pago manager modal opens (shared with Proveedores)
Tipos de IVA manager modal opens (shared with Proveedores)

seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ was created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 tested the new Cultivos tabbed modal pattern and dynamic Formas de Pago/Tipos IVA dropdowns in Clientes and Proveedores. All features working correctly. The Formas de Pago and Tipos IVA are shared catalogs used by both Clientes and Proveedores modules. Backend test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_catalogos_iteration66.py can be reused for regression testing.
